scripts.prestart: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (process.env.FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS) { fs.mkdirSync('dist/config', { recursive: true }); fs.writeFileSync('dist/config/firebase-service-account.json', process.env.FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS); fs.writeFileSync('firebase-services-account.json', process.env.FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS); console.log('Successfully wrote Firebase configurations safely.'); }"
